title: Kadhal Kanave Lyrics Mundasupatti Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Kadhal Kanave
Singer(s): Pradeep Kumar, Kalyani Nair
Music: Sean Roldan
Movie: Mundasupatti

Kadhal kanave thalli pogaadhe pogaadhe
aasa marachi oliyadhe odaadhe. (2)

Kaniye unna kaana kaathuirukken
adiye vazhi naanum paarthirukken.
thenaadiyil neeraadudhe maname
oh poovaliyil nee thoonga vaa dhinamey.

Kadhal kanave thalli pogaadhe pogaadhe
Sethraaama siru mozhi pesu
sirippale narukkunu oosi
padhichaale paravasamaanen sogamaa.

Siru noolaa thuniyil irundhu
thaniyaaga velagi vilundhu
manam ingu elagi pochu medhuvaa.

Iragaala padaga neendndhi
kaththil naanum medhandheney.
kadivaalam kudhiraiyaaga enna thaan
neeyum iluththaaye.

Maaraadhu maname maaney
madi meley  vilundhaen naaney.

Kadhal kanave thalli pogaadhe pogaadhe
aasa marachi oliyadhe odaadhe.

Paruvaththil paniyum senjen
paniyaama medhuvaa ninjen.
pudhuvegam eduthe nadandhaen thaniye

Uruvaththa nizhalaa pudichen
uravaaga kanavula paddhichen
unakkaaga nesamaa thudichen mayile.

Iravodu pagala sera
maalai thaedi irundheney.
kannaadi thotti meenaa
naanum unna paarthaeney.

Maaraadhu maname maaney
madi meley  vilundhaen naaney.

Kadhal kanave thalli pogaadhe pogaadhe
aasa marachi oliyadhe odaadhe.

Kaniye unna kaana kaathuirukken
adiye vazhi naanum paarthirukken.
thenaadiyil neeraadudhe maname
oh poovaliyil nee thoonga vaa dhinamey.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kadhal Kanave?

The song explores themes of love and longing, capturing the emotions of a romantic relationship.

Who composed the music for Mundasupatti?

The music for Mundasupatti was composed by Sean Roldan.

Who are the singers of Kadhal Kanave?

The song is sung by Kalyani Nair and Pradeep Kumar.

What is the release year of the movie Mundasupatti?

The movie Mundasupatti was released in 2014.

What emotions does Kadhal Kanave evoke?

The song evokes emotions of romance, longing, and nostalgia.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Mundasupatti, the song Kadhal Kanave beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. Sung by Kalyani Nair and Pradeep Kumar, the melody is soothing and romantic, perfectly complementing the film's nostalgic setting. Sean Roldan's music adds a layer of depth, making it a memorable piece. The song conveys the emotions of yearning and affection, resonating with anyone who has experienced love. Its gentle rhythm and heartfelt lyrics make it ideal for moments of reflection and romance.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting melody of Kadhal Kanave from the movie Mundasupatti, where the soulful voices of Kalyani Nair and Pradeep Kumar blend seamlessly with Sean Roldan's soothing music. This romantic duet captures the essence of longing and love, making it a timeless favorite. Dive into a world of emotions with this beautifully crafted song.
stanzaMeanings: Love dream, don't go away, don't go away. Don't forget the desire, don't fade away, don't fade away.
Dear, I'm waiting to see you. I'm also looking at the path. In the honey river, the heart is bathing. Oh, come sleep in the flower bed every day.
Love dream, don't go away, don't go away. Speak a little word sweetly, like a needle piercing, I became ecstatic, sadly.
Like a small thread from the cloth, separated and fell, the heart here has become weak, slowly.
Like a feather boat swimming, I also floated in the wind. Like a sharp sword, you pulled me like a horse.
Don't change, my heart, dear, I fell on your lap.
Love dream, don't go away, don't go away. Don't forget the desire, don't fade away, don't fade away.
In the season, the dew also didn't freeze, slowly my heart melted. I walked with new energy, alone.
I caught the shadow of the form, imagined it as a relationship in dreams. I truly longed for you, dear peacock.
I waited for evening to join night and day. In the mirror, I saw you like a fish.
Don't change, my heart, dear, I fell on your lap.
Love dream, don't go away, don't go away. Don't forget the desire, don't fade away, don't fade away.
Dear, I'm waiting to see you. I'm also looking at the path. In the honey river, the heart is bathing. Oh, come sleep in the flower bed every day.
